records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the Ghana Horse Racing Association or National Sports Authority publishes a stable current meeting calendar.
limitations: The National Sports Authority identifies the Ghana Horse Racing Association but does not publish a current meeting calendar on the reviewed page.
No current date and racecourse pairing is approved.
Association recognition must not be treated as proof of active recurring fixtures.
records.notes: Retain an official association-context link until a stable current Ghanaian calendar is reviewed.
